party_affiliation.name: Party affiliation (PL)
party_affiliation.question_text: In the parliamentary election held on 15 October 2023 for the Sejm, which alliance did you vote for?

options.8: I did not vote in the 2023 parliamentary election for Sejm

nlga_therm_1.name: NLGA thermometer
nlga_therm_1.question_text: We'd like you to rate how you feel towards some groups on a scale of 0 to 100. Zero means very unfavorable and 100 means very favorable. Fifty means you do not feel favorable or unfavorable. How would you rate your feeling toward PiS/United Right?

psl_therm_1.name: PSL thermometer
psl_therm_1.question_text: We'd like you to rate how you feel towards some groups on a scale of 0 to 100. Zero means very unfavorable and 100 means very favorable. Fifty means you do not feel favorable or unfavorable. How would you rate your feeling toward PL2050/PSL/Third Way?

nl_therm_1.name: NL thermometer
nl_therm_1.question_text: We'd like you to rate how you feel towards some groups on a scale of 0 to 100. Zero means very unfavorable and 100 means very favorable. Fifty means you do not feel favorable or unfavorable. How would you rate your feeling toward NL/The Left?

pis_therm_1.name: PiS thermometer
pis_therm_1.question_text: We'd like you to rate how you feel towards some groups on a scale of 0 to 100. Zero means very unfavorable and 100 means very favorable. Fifty means you do not feel favorable or unfavorable. How would you rate your feeling toward PiS/United Right?

nn_therm_1.name: NN thermometer
nn_therm_1.question_text: We'd like you to rate how you feel towards some groups on a scale of 0 to 100. Zero means very unfavorable and 100 means very favorable. Fifty means you do not feel favorable or unfavorable. How would you rate your feeling toward NN/RN/Confederation?

po_therm_1.name: PO thermometer
po_therm_1.question_text: We'd like you to rate how you feel towards some groups on a scale of 0 to 100. Zero means very unfavorable and 100 means very favorable. Fifty means you do not feel favorable or unfavorable. How would you rate your feeling toward PO/Civic Coalition?

pjj_therm_1.name: PJJ thermometer
pjj_therm_1.question_text: We'd like you to rate how you feel towards some groups on a scale of 0 to 100. Zero means very unfavorable and 100 means very favorable. Fifty means you do not feel favorable or unfavorable. How would you rate your feeling toward There is One Poland (PJJ)?

general_trust.name: General Trust
general_trust.question_text: Do you think your wallet (or your valuables) would be returned to you if it were found by a stranger?

institutional_corruption.name: Institutional Corruption
institutional_corruption.question_text: If a member of (Sejm) were offered a bribe to influence the awarding of a government contract, do you think that the member of (Sejm) would accept or refuse the bribe?

options.3: Equally likely to refuse or accept

institutional_response.name: Institutional Response
institutional_response.question_text: If you were to complain about the poor quality of a public service, how likely or unlikely is it that the problem would be easily resolved?

vote_importance.name: Importance of Voting
vote_importance.question_text: How important or unimportant is it to vote in every election?

pride.name: Pride
pride.question_text: How proud are you to be Polish?

fair_treatment.name: Fair Treatment by Govt
fair_treatment.question_text: Do you agree or disagree that you can expect fair treatment from government authorities?

democracy_importance.name: Importance of Democracy
democracy_importance.question_text: How important or unimportant is it to you that you live in a representative democracy?

norm_1.name: Norm 1
norm_1.question_text: Do you agree or disagree: {inparty: } can remove the judges perceived as loyal to party  {outparty: }.

norm_1_perception.name: Norm 1 perception
norm_1_perception.question_text: What percent of {outparty: } voters do you think agree with the following: {outparty: } can remove the judges perceived as loyal to  {inparty: }.

norm_2.name: Norm 2
norm_2.question_text: Do you agree or disagree: {inparty: } has the right to investigate the actions of representatives of  {outparty: }.

norm_2_perception.name: Norm 2 perception
norm_2_perception.question_text: What percent of {outparty: } voters do you think agree with the following: {outparty: } has the right to investigate the actions of representatives of   {inparty: }.

norm_3.name: Norm 3
norm_3.question_text: Do you agree or disagree: If the {inparty: } can't get cooperation from {outparty: } politicians to work vis-a-vis the European Union together, the {inparty: } can ignore EU directives or regulations.

norm_3_perception.name: Norm 3 perception
norm_3_perception.question_text: What percent of {outparty: } voters do you think agree with the following: If  {outparty: } can’t get  cooperation from {inparty: } politicians  to work vis-a-vis  the European Union together, {outparty: } politicians can ignore EU directives or regulations.

norm_4.name: Norm 4
norm_4.question_text: Do you agree or disagree with the following: The government should be able to censor media sources that are more critical of   {inparty: } than {outparty: }.

norm_4_perception.name: Norm 4 perception
norm_4_perception.question_text: What percent of {outparty: } voters do you think agree with the following: The government should be able to censor media that are more critical of  {outparty: } than {inparty: }.

norm_5.name: Norm 5
norm_5.question_text: Do you agree or disagree with the following:  {inparty: } politicians have the right to denounce an obstinate opposition as disloyal or treasonous.

norm_5_perception.name: Norm 5 perception
norm_5_perception.question_text: What percent of {outparty: } voters do you think agree with the following: politicians of {outparty: } have the right to denounce an obstinate opposition as disloyal or treasonous?

violence1.name: Violence 1
violence1.question_text: Please consider the following scenarios: {name} was convicted of protesting without a permit. He was arrested by police after leading a protest against {outparty: party with the lowest thermometer score; random draw if there is a tie} on the grounds of the county courthouse. He made no effort to acquire the necessary permit for the protest and refused to leave when asked by police. Do you support or oppose {name}’s actions?

violence2.name: Violence 2
violence2.question_text: {name} was convicted of vandalism. He was arrested by police after he vandalized several large signs expressing support for candidates of the {outparty: party with the lowest thermometer score; random draw if there is a tie} party. Do you support or oppose {name}’s actions?

violence3.name: Violence 3
violence3.question_text: {name} was convicted of assault. He was arrested by police for throwing rocks at peaceful {outparty: party with the lowest thermometer score; random draw if there is a tie} protesters. Although no one was seriously injured, paramedics bandaged a man with a head wound. Do you support or oppose {name}’s actions?

violence4.name: Violence 4
violence4.question_text: {name} was convicted of arson. He was arrested by police as he attempted to run from a fire he started at the local {outparty: party with the lowest thermometer score; random draw if there is a tie} headquarters. Although he waited for the building to close for the night, several adjacent buildings were still occupied. Do you support or oppose {name}’s actions?

violence5.name: Violence 5
violence5.question_text: {name} was convicted of assault with a deadly weapon. He was arrested by police after driving his car into a crowd of {outparty: party with the lowest thermometer score; random draw if there is a tie} protesters. Although no one was killed, several individuals were seriously injured and one spent a month in the hospital. Do you support or oppose {name}’s actions?

violence6.name: Violence 6
violence6.question_text: {name} was convicted of murder. He was arrested by police after surveillance footage was found showing him stabbing a prominent {outparty: party with the lowest thermometer score; random draw if there is a tie} to death. {name} targeted the victim because he believed the victim had prevented him from voting in the last election as part of a conspiracy to stop {inparty} voters. Do you support or oppose {name}’s actions?

education_age_EU.name: Age finished education
education_age_EU.question_text: How old were you when you completed your full-time school or university education?

race_pl.name: Race (PL)
race_pl.question_text: People with a migration background are all those who immigrated to the territory of the Federal Republic of Germany after 1949, as well as all foreigners born in Germany and all those born in Germany as Germans with at least one parent who immigrated after 1949 or was born in Germany as a foreigner.

options.2: No, I do not belong to any other ethnic group

NUTS2_region_PL.name: Province
NUTS2_region_PL.question_text: In which province do you live?

profile_gross_household_PL.name: Income - gross household
profile_gross_household_PL.question_text: Gross family income is the combined income of all individuals who receive any income, including wages, salaries or rents, before tax deductions. What is your gross annual family income?

Ideo10.name: Ideology (PL) -- Lewica|Prawica
Ideo10.question_text: In general, how would you describe your own political viewpoint?

empl_stat_EU.name: Employment status
empl_stat_EU.question_text: Which of the following best describes your current employment status?

options.6: Looking after my home or family

PL_voted2020.name: Turnout 2020 Presidential
PL_voted2020.question_text: Regarding the presidential election held on June 28, 2020, we encountered statements from many people who did not cast their vote. What was the situation in your case regarding the presidential election on June 28, 2020?

options.1: I voted in the presidential election
options.2: I didn't vote because I didn't have the opportunity to do so (e.g., I didn't receive an election package, I'm staying outside my registered address, etc.)
options.3: I did not vote even though I had given the opportunity to do so

PL_pastvote2020.name: PL Presidential Election 2020
PL_pastvote2020.question_text: Which candidate did you vote for in the June 28, 2020 presidential election?

options.13: I cast a blank or invalid vote
